parameters.name: pulse_width
parameters.override_behavior: sets output high duration after a qualifying rising crossing

parameters.name: vtrans
parameters.override_behavior: sets the rising vin trigger threshold

modeling_constraints: Use a rising-threshold crossing event and timer-controlled pulse state.
Drive vout with a smoothed voltage contribution using the public timing parameters.
Do not use current contributions, ddt(), idt(), transistor-level devices, AC/noise analysis, validation hooks, or simulator-specific side channels.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: Each qualifying rising vin crossing through vtrans initiates an output pulse.
Falling vin crossings do not initiate pulses.
After a qualifying trigger, the output target remains high for pulse_width before returning low.
The deasserted and asserted targets are vlogic_low and vlogic_high respectively.
Distinct qualifying rising edges produce corresponding pulses and vout returns low between sufficiently separated events.
Output changes use tdel delay with trise and tfall smoothing without altering the logical pulse duration contract.

title: Single Shot Pulse
